summary: Results-driven SRE leader with 16+ years of experience in production engineering, incident management, and operational excellence. Proven track record leading global teams ensuring 99.9%+ SLA compliance. Passionate about building high-performing teams, driving architectural innovation, and scaling reliability without scaling headcount.

details: Drove operational efficiency from 85% to 98% through systematic process improvements, alert optimization, and automation initiatives.
